discovery.speaker: Wounded Mage
discovery.text: Help me... the rift... I was trying to close it alone. I'm Aria, a scholar of the void.

choices.text: Here, eat this. You need your strength.

backstory.speaker: Aria
backstory.text: I've been studying these rifts for months. They're tears in reality — something on the other side is pushing through. I thought I could close this one alone. I was wrong.

choices.text: Let me help you. Take some food.

helped.speaker: Aria
helped.text: Thank you... I can feel my strength returning already. I'll follow you — together we can close these rifts.

bond_30.speaker: Aria
bond_30.text: You know, I'm starting to feel much better. The corruption from the rift was draining me, but being away from it... I think I can help you fight now.

bond_50.speaker: Aria
bond_50.text: I want to teach you something. I've studied ice magic extensively — watch closely. This is Frost Nova. It freezes everything nearby. Use it when they surround you.

choices.text: I can feel the power. Thank you, Aria.

bond_80.speaker: Aria
bond_80.text: There's something I need to tell you. The rifts... they weren't always here. Someone opened them — a mage far more powerful than me. I found their journal before the corruption took the library. They were trying to reach something on the other side. Something ancient. I don't think they succeeded, but the rifts remain. Each one we close weakens the connection. If we close enough of them...

choices.text: How many do we need to close?

lore_mage.speaker: Aria
lore_mage.text: The journal was unsigned. But the magic was old — older than our traditions. Whoever they were, they understood the void better than anyone alive today. And here's the spell they left behind. Arcane Barrage — raw void energy. Dangerous, but effective.

lore_count.speaker: Aria
lore_count.text: I don't know exactly. But each rift we seal permanently weakens the boundary. The corruption recedes. The monsters thin out. Close enough and maybe... maybe the tears will stop forming entirely. Take this spell — Arcane Barrage. You'll need it for the stronger rifts.
